title: Drama Brewing at Red Bull After Remco Evenepoel Not Happy With Lipowitz
summary:
Evenepoel calls out Florian Lipowitz in what's the first sign of tension inside Red Bull-Bora-Hansgrohe after the Tour's first mountain stage.

Read the full article at Drama Brewing at Red Bull After Remco Evenepoel Not Happy With Lipowitz on Velo.
